items.title: Medelijden in Frankrijk voor Marseille en De Lange: 'Deed wat hij kon'
items.summary: De crisis bij Olympique Marseille kreeg zondagavond een nieuw hoofdstuk. De ploeg van Roberto De Zerbi, met Jeffrey de Lange en Quinten Timber in de basis, verloor met keiharde cijfers van Paris Saint-Germain en werd niet gespaard door de Franse pers.

items.title: Horwich looks to remain unbeaten at Wolverhampton
items.summary: We have a busy day’s racing on Monday with action from Plumpton and Wolverhampton, live on Sky Sports Racing...

items.title: Uitglijder Memphis kost Corinthians de kop tegen Palmeiras
items.summary: Memphis Depay heeft een hoofdrol opgeëist in de wedstrijd tussen Corinthians en Palmeiras, maar niet op de manier waarop hij had gehoopt. De Nederlandse aanvaller miste een strafschop in de Campeonato Paulista, het Braziliaanse staatskampioenschap. In de slotfase sloeg Palmeiras toe: 0-1.

items.title: Rondje Eredivisie: PSV de snelste kampioen?
items.summary: Waar PSV blijft winnen, leed Ajax weer puntenverlies. Feyenoord daarentegen maakte in Utrecht een einde aan een zwakke serie . We bespreken deze zaken en nog veel meer in een nieuwe aflevering van Rondje Eredivisie.

items.title: Cadillac reveal split livery for first F1 car - during Super Bowl!
items.summary: The new Cadillac team revealed their first Formula 1 car livery in an advert during the Super Bowl as the new American outfit made a high-profile splash during the country's biggest sporting event.

items.title: Labyad wordt ploeggenoot Memphis, maar trainer kent aanwinst niet
items.summary: Zakaria Labyad staat op het punt zijn loopbaan te vervolgen bij Corinthians. De 32-jarige aanvallende middenvelder wordt in Brazilië herenigd met Memphis Depay, met wie hij samenspeelde bij PSV.

items.title: Tottenham in relegation battle, says Rooney
items.summary: Tottenham Hotspur are in a relegation battle, says former England captain Wayne Rooney.

items.title: Super League 2026 storylines: Key coaching changes and three new teams
items.summary: Coaching changes, new squads, stars on show and up-and-comers with a point to prove. The Super League 2026 season is about to begin and, with it, storylines take shape.

items.title: Bij Feyenoord gaat het alleen nog om overleven
items.summary: In de strijd om Champions League-voetbal hebben trainer Robin van Persie en Feyenoord al hun geloofsbrieven uit het raam gegooid. Dat leverde tegen FC Utrecht drie belangrijke punten op.

items.title: Seahawks beat Patriots in masterclass to win Super Bowl 60
items.summary: Sam Darnold crowned his staggering comeback story with once-unthinkable glory, Aden Durde made British NFL history and the Seattle Seahawks became Super Bowl champions for the second time as they beat the New England Patriots 29-13 at Levi's Stadium, Santa Clara on Sunday.

items.title: Gotterup beats Matsuyama in Phoenix Open play-off with Scheffler tied third
items.summary: Chris Gotterup came up on the rails to win the Phoenix Open after beating Hideki Matsuyama in a play-off.

items.title: VAR review: Liverpool anger justified in no red card for Man City?
items.summary: After Liverpool's loss, coach Arne Slot fumed that Man City deserved a red card: Is he right?

items.title: Man City's comeback thriller keeps Premier League title hopes alive; Liverpool slip further
items.summary: Liverpool looked set to win, but Man City's two unanswered goals mean the Premier League title race stays alive and Liverpool's Champions League hopes are in doubt.

items.title: Haaland earns City dramatic late win at Liverpool
items.summary: Erling Haaland kept Manchester City in the title race with an added-time penalty as Pep Guardiola's side came from behind to win 2-1 in a chaotic finish.

items.title: Pep warns Arsenal: 'A lot can happen' in title race
items.summary: Pep Guardiola has warned Arsenal that 'a lot can happen in 13 games' as the Premier League title race heats up.

items.title: Arbeloa: Mbappé can match Ronaldo at Madrid
items.summary: Coach Álvaro Arbeloa said Kylian Mbappé "has the qualities" to match the "out of this world" Cristiano Ronaldo's impact at Real Madrid.

items.title: European football: PSG thrash Marseille and return to summit of Ligue 1
items.summary: Dembélé doubles up in 5-0 mauling Kane and Díaz on target in Bayern win Ousmane Dembélé struck twice as Paris Saint-Germain blew away bitter rivals Marseille on Sunday, reclaiming top spot in Ligue 1 with a crushing 5-0 victory at the Parc des Princes. Dembélé opened the scoring after just 12 minutes and added a second before half-time as PSG delivered a real statement of intent going into the crucial months of the season. Continue reading...

items.title: Rangers to host Celtic in Scottish Cup quarter-finals
items.summary: Rangers host Old Firm rivals Celtic and holders Aberdeen face a potential trip to Dunfermline in the Scottish Cup quarter-finals.

items.title: Who has made Troy's Premier League team of the week?
items.summary: After every round of Premier League matches this season Troy Deeney gives us his team of the week. Do you agree with his choices?

items.title: Tonali high on Man Utd shortlist - Monday's gossip
items.summary: Sandro Tonali high on Manchester United's shortlist to replace Casrmiro, Liverpool open to letting Federico Chiesa leave, Tottenham do not intend to turn Randal Kolo Muani's loan move permanent, plus more.
